subject: FW: FW: Dubai
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, June 11, 2008 11:02 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: FW: Dubai

Fyi. 

----- Original Message -----
From: Cecile de Jongh <ceciledejongh@yahoo.com>
To: Farkas, Andrew L.
Cc: John deJongh <john.dejongh@go.vi.gov>
Sent: Wed Jun 11 10:59:21 2008
Subject: Re: FW: Dubai

Hi Andrew,
 
Thank you for your kind response.  I am taking some 12 kids (8 from Eudora Kean High School) to Rwanda on July 18th to do some humanitarian work in Kigali.  A few of the kids have never been off the island so this will be quite an experience for them.  
 
On our return (August 4th) we will travel from Rwanda to Kenya and then on to Dubai.  We have a seven hour lay over in Dubai and I thought it would be nice for the kids to see a little bit of the place since we have some time.  There will be a total of 18 persons in the group: 12 kids and six adults.  Anything you can do is most appreciated.
 
Kind regards,
 
Cecile
 


John deJongh <john.dejongh@go.vi.gov> wrote:

	???
	
	-----Original Message-----
	From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
	Sent: Tuesday, June 10, 2008 7:52 PM
	To: John deJongh
	Subject: Dubai
	
	Dear Governor,
	
	I was just informed that you and the first lady would like me to set up a tour for her and the students when you're in dubai. Pls have someone call me so I can make appropriate arrangements.
	--------------------------------------------------------
	
	
	The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not necessarily represent those of the company.
